title: Spears Lances of Longinus and Cassius
display_title: Spears Lances of Longinus and Cassius
wikitext:
[]: Spears (Lances) of Longinus & Cassius             Quote Post by bladerj » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:32 pm Is the Spear of Longinus part of an angel or an angel itself ? "the thing that came from space" had arms like the spear, and in the flashback to second impact you see two spears this time around. EDIT by REICHU : Spear of Cassius' name revealed starting here .

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:37 pm We don't know lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 16, 2009 9:04 pm The thing that came from Kaworu looked like this: There were 4 spears during the 2nd Impact flashback, I'd assume, one for each of the things with halos.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Jul 16, 2009 9:06 pm off topic - does any one know what was revealed in that "do not open" little box on the pic??

[]:             Quote Post by Rayshiest » Thu Jul 16, 2009 9:24 pm isnt that the tape that keeps the magazine closed?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jul 17, 2009 12:48 pm If the Spears haven't changed from the TV Series version (which is highly unlikely), then they're just security devices to keep Seeds of Life from shirking their duties or keeping gods in check. But we dont know lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Jul 17, 2009 12:58 pm i swear i remember reading somewhere that they are "living enteties" different from angels/humans but only have the sole purpose to incapacitate a sol

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 1:09 pm Axell wrote: i swear i remember reading somewhere that they are "living enteties" different from angels/humans but only have the sole purpose to incapacitate a sol

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Jul 17, 2009 1:14 pm ^there it is! yay my memory is good for once :P

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Fri Jul 17, 2009 5:23 pm It is possible that the nature of the lance in Rebuild has changed. It might not be unreasonable to assume that it could have angelic origins. Semi-on-topic: Does anyone else perfer the Rebuild lance to the original? It just looks more like a real weapon than the previous incarnation?.

[]:             Quote Post by User-iel » Sun Aug 02, 2009 6:20 am Wow. This spear is starting to STRONGLY resemble the real Spear of Fuchai. I did wonder from time to time if that spear was the beginning of the design process for the Original Spear of Longinus. Well, that and DNA as others already cite.

[]:             Quote Post by Duskbyday » Sun Aug 02, 2009 12:41 pm It could just be the original or...a new replica? Either way Angel's gonna get a beatin!

[]: A Better Look at Kaworu's Massive, Throbbing Rod [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Aug 29, 2009 11:26 pm We never get a good look at the spear Kaworu skewers Unit 01 with in the camrip. Fortunately, we have this toy-- erm, adult collectible . It, ah... looks like a wand from a magical girl anime. Definitely doesn't look like NGE's Spear of Longinus, in any case.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sat Aug 29, 2009 11:32 pm RoE is diffferent. They redisgned things, like Lillith, the NERV and SEELE emblems, Unit 02, etc. etc.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Aug 29, 2009 11:33 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: RoE is diffferent. They redisgned things, like Lillith, the NERV and SEELE emblems, Unit 02, etc. etc.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Aug 29, 2009 11:34 pm are you sure that collectible is official, not fan made?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Aug 29, 2009 11:41 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: are you sure that collectible is official, not fan made?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Aug 30, 2009 12:17 am Adult collectible? I wonder why.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 30, 2009 12:39 am The action figure is just a rip-off of the illustration on the front of the 2.0 movie booklet anyway. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=259132#259132 In other words: old news. Also, this thread is gonna get merged. I know you put a lot of effort into that title, NAW. Sorry.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sun Aug 30, 2009 12:58 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: Adult collectible? I wonder why.
